requirements.summary: Add admin login form on AdminPage with password input field
acceptanceCriteria: AdminPage displays a login form when user is not authenticated
Login form includes password input field and submit button
Form validates password is not empty before submission

file_operations.description: Add admin login form component that displays when user is not authenticated. Include password input field with visibility toggle, submit button, and form validation to ensure password is not empty before submission. Wrap existing product upload form in authentication check to only show after successful login.
Add useAdminLogin mutation hook that calls the backend password verification method. Handle success/failure states and store authentication status in React state or session storage for persistence.

requirements.summary: Protect product upload and category management behind admin authentication
acceptanceCriteria: Product upload form is only visible after successful admin login
Unauthenticated users see only the login form on AdminPage
Admin session persists across page refreshes

file_operations.description: Implement authentication state management using React state and session storage. Check authentication status on component mount and persist it across page refreshes. Conditionally render either the login form (when not authenticated) or the product upload form (when authenticated).

Create custom hook to manage admin authentication state. Provide methods to check authentication status, store/retrieve session from sessionStorage, and expose isAuthenticated boolean and login/logout functions to consuming components.

acceptanceCriteria: Authenticated admin can log out from the AdminPage
Logout clears admin session and returns to login form
Logout button is visible only when admin is authenticated

file_operations.description: Add logout button that is visible only when admin is authenticated. Button should clear the admin session from state and sessionStorage, then return user to the login form view.
Add logout method to the admin authentication hook that clears authentication state from both React state and sessionStorage, ensuring complete session cleanup.
